workflow.name: Set Up a Destructible Object
workflow.description: Create a physics-enabled destructible actor with collision, fracture configuration, and impulse response for breakable objects like crates and barrels.
intentPatterns: set up object that breaks on impact
prerequisites: A static mesh asset for the object

steps.purpose: Inspect the source mesh for poly count and bounds
Generate collision for the mesh if not present
Create a physics asset for the mesh
Create a physics material with appropriate friction and restitution
Spawn the mesh as a StaticMeshActor in the level
Set mobility to Movable for physics simulation
Enable Simulate Physics on the mesh component
Assign the physics profile with destruction threshold
Configure break force threshold for destruction trigger

workflow.expectedOutcome: A physics-enabled destructible object that breaks apart when hit with sufficient force, with configurable break thresholds
